3-Point Shooting Leaderboard
Ranks qualified NCAA players by 3-point production and efficiency for the 2025-26 season. Click any column header to re-sort. Click a player name to view their full profile.
ColumnDescription
3PM3-point field goals made per game
3PA3-point field goal attempts per game
3P%3-point field goal percentage
3PAr3-point attempt rate — share of all field goal attempts that are 3-pointers (%)
3P% Pctile3P% percentile rank vs. all qualified players in the same season
3PA Pctile3PA/game percentile rank vs. all qualified players
GPQQualified = meets minimum games played & minutes per game thresholds

Conference weights for context: Power 5: 100% · High-Major: 88% · Mid-Major: 76% · Low-Major: 58%
